response:
| Pros | Cons |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Flexibility** — Employees can often set their own schedules and work from anywhere, improving work-life balance. | **Isolation** — Lack of in-person interaction with colleagues can lead to feelings of loneliness and disconnection. |
| **No commute** — Eliminating travel time saves money on transportation and reduces daily stress. | **Communication challenges** — Collaborating across time zones and relying on digital tools can lead to miscommunication or delays. |
| **Cost savings** — Both employees and employers save money on commuting, office space, meals, and work attire. | **Blurred boundaries** — The home can become an office, making it harder to "switch off" and increasing risk of burnout. |
